lines.raw: What caused the fire? | 火灾是由什么引起的？

lines.english: At last firemen have put out a big forest fire in California.
lines.chinese: 消防队员终于扑灭了加利福尼亚州的一场森林大火。
lines.raw: At last firemen have put out a big forest fire in California. | 消防队员终于扑灭了加利福尼亚州的一场森林大火。

lines.english: Since then, they have been trying to find out how the fire began.
lines.chinese: 从那时起，他们一直在努力查明火灾是如何开始的。
lines.raw: Since then, they have been trying to find out how the fire began. | 从那时起，他们一直在努力查明火灾是如何开始的。

lines.english: Forest fires are often caused by broken glass or by cigarette ends which people carelessly throw away.
lines.chinese: 森林火灾通常是由碎玻璃或人们随意丢弃的烟头引起的。
lines.raw: Forest fires are often caused by broken glass or by cigarette ends which people carelessly throw away. | 森林火灾通常是由碎玻璃或人们随意丢弃的烟头引起的。

lines.english: Yesterday the firemen examined the ground carefully,
lines.chinese: 昨天消防队员仔细检查了地面，
lines.raw: Yesterday the firemen examined the ground carefully, | 昨天消防队员仔细检查了地面，

lines.english: but were not able to find any broken glass.
lines.chinese: 但没能找到任何碎玻璃。
lines.raw: but were not able to find any broken glass. | 但没能找到任何碎玻璃。

lines.english: They were also quite sure that a cigarette end did not start the fire.
lines.chinese: 他们也相当确定不是烟头引起的火灾。
lines.raw: They were also quite sure that a cigarette end did not start the fire. | 他们也相当确定不是烟头引起的火灾。

lines.english: This morning, however, a firemen accidentally discovered the cause.
lines.chinese: 然而，今天早上，一名消防队员偶然发现了起火原因。
lines.raw: This morning, however, a firemen accidentally discovered the cause. | 然而，今天早上，一名消防队员偶然发现了起火原因。

lines.english: He noticed the remains of a snake which was wound round the electric wires of a 16, 000-volt power line.
lines.chinese: 他发现了一条缠绕在16000伏高压电线上的蛇的残骸。
lines.raw: He noticed the remains of a snake which was wound round the electric wires of a 16, 000-volt power line. | 他发现了一条缠绕在16000伏高压电线上的蛇的残骸。

lines.english: In this way, he was able to solve the mystery.
lines.chinese: 就这样，他解开了这个谜团。
lines.raw: In this way, he was able to solve the mystery. | 就这样，他解开了这个谜团。

lines.english: The explanation was simple but very unusual.
lines.chinese: 解释很简单，但非常不同寻常。
lines.raw: The explanation was simple but very unusual. | 解释很简单，但非常不同寻常。

lines.english: A bird had snatched up the snake from the ground and then dropped it on to the wires.
lines.chinese: 一只鸟从地上抓起这条蛇，然后把它掉到了电线上。
lines.raw: A bird had snatched up the snake from the ground and then dropped it on to the wires. | 一只鸟从地上抓起这条蛇，然后把它掉到了电线上。

lines.english: The snake then wound itself round the wires.
lines.raw: The snake then wound itself round the wires. | 然后蛇缠绕在电线上。

lines.english: When it did so, it sent sparks down to the ground and these immediately started a fire.
lines.chinese: 当它这样做时，它向地面发出了火花，这些火花立刻引发了一场火灾。
lines.raw: When it did so, it sent sparks down to the ground and these immediately started a fire. | 当它这样做时，它向地面发出了火花，这些火花立刻引发了一场火灾。
